code:
import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn flush_token(_ nums: List<Int>, _ token: String) -> List<Int>
  if string.is_empty(token)
    nums
  else
    match string.parse_int(token)
    when Some(v)
      list.push(nums, v)
    when None
      nums
    end
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when None
    ()
  when Some(line)
    mut nums: List<Int> = []
    mut token = ""
    mut i = 0
    let n = string.len(line)
    while i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        if is_ws(b)
          nums = flush_token(nums, token)
          token = ""
        else
          token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    nums = flush_token(nums, token)

    let total = list.len(nums)
    mut out = ""
    mut j = total - 1
    mut first = true
    while j >= 0
      match list.get(nums, j)
      when Some(v)
        if first
          out = "#{v}"
          first = false
        else
          out = "#{out} #{v}"
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      j = j - 1
    end
    println(out)
  end
end
